hooks.command: /usr/bin/python3 -c 'import runpy; from pathlib import Path; cwd = Path.cwd().resolve(); root = next((path for path in (cwd, *cwd.parents) if (path / ".git").exists()), None); assert root is not None, "git root not found"; runpy.run_path(str(root / "scripts" / "codex_turn_flow_hooks.py"), run_name="__main__")'
